Meta.title: Drwintech — Innovative digital solutions in West Africa
Meta.description: Drwintech partners with West African organizations to drive their digital transformation: consulting, software, e-learning, media, cybersecurity.

Hero.title: Let's engineer your <gradient>digital future</gradient>
Hero.subtitle: Strategy, software engineering, cybersecurity, e-learning and media production. A single partner for your most demanding digital ambitions.

Services.title: Six disciplines, <gradient>one promise</gradient>
Services.subtitle: From strategy to execution, we cover the entire digital value chain so you can scale with confidence.

consulting.title: Consulting & Transformation
consulting.description: Diagnostics, digital strategy and change management. We shape your roadmap and align your teams.

it.title: IT, Cybersecurity & Maintenance
it.description: Information systems management, hardening, monitoring and proactive maintenance for a reliable infrastructure.

software.title: Custom software
software.description: Business apps, ERP integrations, SaaS platforms. Clean, scalable code, delivered agile.

elearning.title: E-learning & Pedagogy
elearning.description: LMS platforms, SCORM modules, interactive content. We empower your teams and audiences.

media.title: Media production
media.description: Corporate films, motion design, podcasts, social content. Storytelling that serves your goals.

web.title: Web & Portals
web.description: Marketing sites, client portals, intranets, e-commerce. Fast, accessible, built to convert.

About.title: A studio founded in 2021, already trusted by <gradient>500+ clients</gradient>
About.paragraph1: Drwintech was born from a conviction: West Africa's digital transformation requires local, demanding, deeply committed partners. Since 2021, we've helped institutions, SMBs and large groups design and ship high-impact digital solutions.
About.paragraph2: Our multidisciplinary team — strategists, engineers, designers, educators and creatives — operates studio-style to deliver fast, cleanly, and built to last.

excellence.title: Operational excellence
excellence.description: Reliable delivery, maintainable code, audited processes.

innovation.title: Useful innovation
innovation.description: Tech serves your goals, not the other way around.

impact.title: Local impact
impact.description: Local talent grown on the job, regional economic spillover.

Portfolio.title: Projects that <gradient>ship results</gradient>
Portfolio.subtitle: A few of our recent collaborations, from concept to launch.

detail.methodIntro: Every project is run with the double diamond, the Design Council standard: two divergent phases (broad exploration) alternated with two convergent phases (structural choices). It ensures we design the right thing before designing it right.

define.label: Define
define.hint: Frame the real problem to solve.

Team.title: Complementary <gradient>profiles</gradient>
Team.subtitle: Strategists, engineers, designers and creatives under one roof.

Process.title: From idea to launch, in <gradient>four stages</gradient>

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: Framing, workshops, audit of existing systems, KPI definition.

design.title: Design
design.description: Architecture, interactive prototypes, design system, user validation.

build.title: Build
build.description: Iterative development, weekly reviews, continuous integration.

scale.title: Scale
scale.description: Production rollout, training, support, ongoing optimization.

CTA.title: Ready to scale?
CTA.subtitle: Let's talk about your project. First chat free, no commitment, within 24 hours.

Footer.tagline: Building innovative digital solutions across West Africa.
Footer.newsletterDesc: Our tech insights, once a month. No spam.

Contact.subtitle: Describe what you need, we'll get back within one business day.
